testcase.name: The right SHIELDS panel continues beyond the right frame edge and its label is rendered in very low-contrast gray, while the left SCORE panel is fully visible and bright.

failure.message: The right SHIELDS panel continues beyond the right frame edge and its label is rendered in very low-contrast gray, while the left SCORE panel is fully visible and bright.

testcase.failure: Expected: The gameplay HUD should remain inside the 1280×720 safe area, use consistent panel geometry, and keep critical shield text readable. Observed: The right SHIELDS panel continues beyond the right frame edge and its label is rendered in very low-contrast gray, while the left SCORE panel is fully visible and bright. Evidence: screenshots/001_game_frame.png

testcase.name: A bright magenta rectangle and the text 'STALE DEBUG BOUNDS' remain over the central gameplay object in the final frame.

failure.message: A bright magenta rectangle and the text 'STALE DEBUG BOUNDS' remain over the central gameplay object in the final frame.

testcase.failure: Expected: A player-facing gameplay frame should not expose editor/debug overlays, and debug labels should never occlude the focal object. Observed: A bright magenta rectangle and the text 'STALE DEBUG BOUNDS' remain over the central gameplay object in the final frame. Evidence: screenshots/003_game_frame.png

testcase.name: The SCORE panel shifts downward relative to the previous frame, and the MISSION READY panel shifts left and downward while the center object and SHIELDS panel remain stable.

failure.message: The SCORE panel shifts downward relative to the previous frame, and the MISSION READY panel shifts left and downward while the center object and SHIELDS panel remain stable.

testcase.failure: Expected: Persistent HUD panels should keep stable anchors and baselines across adjacent frames unless an intentional animation is visible. Observed: The SCORE panel shifts downward relative to the previous frame, and the MISSION READY panel shifts left and downward while the center object and SHIELDS panel remain stable. Evidence: screenshots/002_game_frame.png
